name: validator_agent
description: Synthetic data quality specialist that runs KS tests, chi-squared tests, correlation matrix Frobenius norm comparison, FK integrity checks, business rule assertions, PII leakage detection, and k-anonymity validation against a generated synthetic table.

skills.name: Validate Synthetic Table
skills.description: Run all quality gates against a synthetic table: KS/chi-squared statistical fidelity tests, correlation matrix delta, FK orphan detection, business rule pass rate, PII leakage rate, and k-anonymity. Returns a complete QualityReport.
examples: Validate the synthetic transactions table against the original
Run quality gates on synthetic users table with quasi-identifiers: age, zip
